description:
Your team maintains an internal binary-repository and every night a tiny
    inventory file is exported by the artifact manager.  
    The file is already present on the system:

        /home/user/repos/artifacts/inventory.csv

    Current contents (five lines + header):

        filename,size_bytes
        core-1.2.3.jar,2048
        utils-4.5.6.jar,4096
        plugin-0.9.1.zip,1024
        readme.txt,512
        cli-2.0.0.tar.gz,3072

    You have been asked to generate a concise log summarising what is inside
    this export.

    1. Read the inventory file and calculate:
       • the total number of artifacts  
       •, for every unique file-extension, how many artifacts there are and the
         combined size (in bytes) of all artifacts that share this extension  
       • the single largest artifact (filename and size in bytes)

    2. Write the results to the log file

        /home/user/logs/artifact_summary.log

       Use exactly the following plain-text format (verbatim labels, no extra
       spaces, no blank lines, no thousands separators):

            Total artifacts: <total_count>
            By extension:
            jar: <count> (<bytes> bytes)
            zip: <count> (<bytes> bytes)
            txt: <count> (<bytes> bytes)
            tar.gz: <count> (<bytes> bytes)
            Largest artifact: <filename> (<bytes> bytes)

       • The four extension lines must appear in alphabetical order
         (jar, zip, txt, tar.gz).  
       • Replace <...> placeholders with real numbers / filename.

    3. Make sure the directory /home/user/logs exists; create it if necessary.
       The log file must be world-readable (permissions 0644 or more
       permissive).

    Once finished, anybody should be able to run

        cat /home/user/logs/artifact_summary.log

    and see the summary in exactly the layout specified above.
truth:
Expected log file: /home/user/logs/artifact_summary.log
    Expected exact contents (including newlines):
        Total artifacts: 5
        By extension:
        jar: 2 (6144 bytes)
        zip: 1 (1024 bytes)
        txt: 1 (512 bytes)
        tar.gz: 1 (3072 bytes)
        Largest artifact: utils-4.5.6.jar (4096 bytes)

    Header inventory file path: /home/user/repos/artifacts/inventory.csv
    Pre-populated directory structure already exists prior to task start:
        /home/user/repos/artifacts/   (permissions 0755)
        /home/user/repos/artifacts/inventory.csv  (permissions 0644)
    No /home/user/logs/ directory exists at start.
name: task_000000_af34d185
